## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] No internal-only details (private hostnames, secret/credential paths, internal issue/MR references) in code, comments, or commit messages
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered (this is a shared library)
